records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait a minute, my good penguins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait a minute, my good penguins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait a minute, my good penguins.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Calm down, and let me explain
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Calm down, and let me explain
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Calm down, and let me explain
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monenene!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monenene!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monenene!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this okay? A lot of things are bursting out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this okay? A lot of things are bursting out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this okay? A lot of things are bursting out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was she... selling something this dangerous in the store?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was she... selling something this dangerous in the store?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was she... selling something this dangerous in the store?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't matter! This is enough to turn things around!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't matter! This is enough to turn things around!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't matter! This is enough to turn things around!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't rob innocent laborers of their goods! You should be ashamed of yourself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't rob innocent laborers of their goods! You should be ashamed of yourself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't rob innocent laborers of their goods! You should be ashamed of yourself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mone mone! Mone mone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mone mone! Mone mone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mone mone! Mone mone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Vice President is to double the paycheck of all laborers as an apology!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Vice President is to double the paycheck of all laborers as an apology!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Vice President is to double the paycheck of all laborers as an apology!

records.m_Talk_ENG: While you're at it, give us four days a week off! Working in a container doesn't help with productivity!
records.m_Talk_DEU: While you're at it, give us four days a week off! Working in a container doesn't help with productivity!
records.m_Talk_FRA: While you're at it, give us four days a week off! Working in a container doesn't help with productivity!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And provide a catered buffet for employee dinners
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And provide a catered buffet for employee dinners
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And provide a catered buffet for employee dinners
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaah?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaah?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaah?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's enough. Not even the biggest conglomerates provide that many benefits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's enough. Not even the biggest conglomerates provide that many benefits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's enough. Not even the biggest conglomerates provide that many benefits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Yuppie. It seems that you have forgotten that you haven't even signed a contract yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Yuppie. It seems that you have forgotten that you haven't even signed a contract yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Yuppie. It seems that you have forgotten that you haven't even signed a contract yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keep in mind that your results are subject to change at any time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keep in mind that your results are subject to change at any time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keep in mind that your results are subject to change at any time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forget it, I'm out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forget it, I'm out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forget it, I'm out.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Of course. Then
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Of course. Then
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Of course. Then
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what did you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what did you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what did you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm out. Your company has an average score of 1.24 on the job review website.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm out. Your company has an average score of 1.24 on the job review website.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm out. Your company has an average score of 1.24 on the job review website.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Gives you crap for eating breakroom snacks." "Doesn't let you use your vacation days." "The Vice President has a tyrannical personality."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Gives you crap for eating breakroom snacks." "Doesn't let you use your vacation days." "The Vice President has a tyrannical personality."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Gives you crap for eating breakroom snacks." "Doesn't let you use your vacation days." "The Vice President has a tyrannical personality."

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was full of reviews like that. Why would I want to join a company like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was full of reviews like that. Why would I want to join a company like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was full of reviews like that. Why would I want to join a company like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to discourage someone else's kid just to help out my kids.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to discourage someone else's kid just to help out my kids.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to discourage someone else's kid just to help out my kids.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was hoping it didn't have to come to this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was hoping it didn't have to come to this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was hoping it didn't have to come to this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief. This is a genuine question, but do you have two fathers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief. This is a genuine question, but do you have two fathers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief. This is a genuine question, but do you have two fathers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... Daddy is the only daddy I have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... Daddy is the only daddy I have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... Daddy is the only daddy I have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... what's that in the sky?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... what's that in the sky?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... what's that in the sky?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let me explain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let me explain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let me explain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: On a code red, Coffin Company is allowed to activate the secret weapon with the approval of the executives!
records.m_Talk_DEU: On a code red, Coffin Company is allowed to activate the secret weapon with the approval of the executives!
records.m_Talk_FRA: On a code red, Coffin Company is allowed to activate the secret weapon with the approval of the executives!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that is the newest model of the remote controlled machinoid interface Machine G.A.P!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that is the newest model of the remote controlled machinoid interface Machine G.A.P!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that is the newest model of the remote controlled machinoid interface Machine G.A.P!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Its calculation abilities may be lacking, but it's the fruit of modern technology with a superalloy golden armor frame!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Its calculation abilities may be lacking, but it's the fruit of modern technology with a superalloy golden armor frame!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Its calculation abilities may be lacking, but it's the fruit of modern technology with a superalloy golden armor frame!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And its name is
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And its name is
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And its name is
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaaaah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaaaah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaaaah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: SUPER Machine G.A.P. Such a clever name. Brilliant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: SUPER Machine G.A.P. Such a clever name. Brilliant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: SUPER Machine G.A.P. Such a clever name. Brilliant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you've declared that you no longer wish to be with us, I will have to treat you like a criminal and not an employee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you've declared that you no longer wish to be with us, I will have to treat you like a criminal and not an employee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you've declared that you no longer wish to be with us, I will have to treat you like a criminal and not an employee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Look, Ms. Vice President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Look, Ms. Vice President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Look, Ms. Vice President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can I still sign the employment contract?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can I still sign the employment contract?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can I still sign the employment contract?
